name: Palo Alto Networks Enterprise DLP
description: Integrates with Palo Alto Networks Enterprise DLP API for incident review, report retrieval, assignee management, and data pattern monitoring across SASE infrastructure

actions.name: List DLP Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve all DLP incidents in the tenant with optional filtering by date range, severity, and status

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

actions.name: Get Report Details
actions.description: Retrieve detailed report for a specific DLP incident including matched data patterns and file metadata

parameters.name: reportId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP report

parameters.name: fetchSnippets
parameters.description: Include matched data snippets in the response

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Update incident details including assignee, notes, and status

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP incident

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: User email to assign the incident to

parameters.name: notes
parameters.description: Notes to add to the incident

actions.name: List Data Patterns
actions.description: Retrieve all configured data patterns used for sensitive data detection

actions.name: List Data Profiles
actions.description: Retrieve all data profiles that group data patterns for policy enforcement
